synopsis: [El-errata] ELSA-2025-23530 Important: Oracle Linux 8 python39:3.9 security update
description:
mod_wsgi
numpy
python39
[3.9.25-2]
- Add explicit BR: libxcrypt-devel
- Properly apply exported CFLAGS for dtrace/systemtap builds
- Update to Python 3.9.25
- Move _sysconfigdata_d_linux*.py to the debug subpackage
- Fedora contributions by:
      Bjorn Esser <besser82 at fedoraproject.org>
      Charalampos Stratakis <cstratak at redhat.com>
      Karolina Surma <ksurma at redhat.com>
      Tomas Orsava <torsava at redhat.com>
      Tomas Hrnciar <thrnciar at redhat.com>
Resolves: RHEL-128539

Oracle Linux Security Advisory ELSA-2025-23530

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2025-23530.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 8 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:
